regions_parent_fk_soft.name: regions_parent_fk_soft
regions_parent_fk_soft.value: parent_code IS NULL OR parent_code <> code

polls_window_ck.name: polls_window_ck
polls_window_ck.value: opens_at IS NULL OR closes_at IS NULL OR closes_at > opens_at

notif_provider_ck.name: notif_provider_ck
notif_provider_ck.value: provider IS NULL OR provider IN ('resend', 'brevo')
